title: sladeniaceae
intro: Sladeniaceae is a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of flowering plants that are classified together due to shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships. It is a taxonomic rank that groups together closely related genera within the plant kingdom. The Sladeniaceae family is composed of approximately 10-20 species and is typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. These plants often have unique features such as distinctive flowers and leaves, setting them apart from other plant families.
